name: Delightful Cabbage Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the almonds and sesame seeds in a 350 degree oven for about 10-12 minutes.
2. Mix all ingredients for dressing and let sit for about one hour.
3. Mix all salad ingredients, adding cooled and broken up toasted almonds and sesame seeds. Do not cook the ramen; simply break it into small pieces.
4. Toss the salad with the dressing mixture.
